ddls:
CREATE TABLE "creatures" (
  "creature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creature */,
  "bone_length" REAL /* Length of the creature's bones */,
  "rotting_flesh" REAL /* Percentage of rotting flesh */,
  "hair_length" REAL /* Length of the creature's hair */,
  "has_soul" REAL /* Presence of a soul (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the creature */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creature type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the creature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the creature was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location or habitat of the creature */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the creature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the creature */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the creature is active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creatures_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the creature type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the creature type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the type was last updated */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of creatures of this type */,
  "common_habitat" TEXT /* Common habitat of creatures of this type */,
  "is_rare" INTEGER /* Indicates if the creature type is rare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, content creator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user creatures" (
  "user_creature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-creature association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "creature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-creature association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-creature association was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user-creature association (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_creature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creature interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "creature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creature */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction was last updated */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creature versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "creature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creature */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON data representing the creature's attributes at this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
